feedback.text: Its actually insane that we are in this position we are with Products (Games) customers buying !!! Imagine if An automotive manufacturer closed lets say Audi for example and they took your OWN car back because they closed !!! Its outrageous and far from what Customers Rights Should stand for !!! Once this fiasco is over and i believe/hope this will end with a logical solution we need to figure out HOW and WHO brought us (customers) in this position we are in and rethink on who we want to spend our hard Earned money AKA Boycot !!! #STOP KILLING GAMES
